title: Wayfair box-damage truckload (26 pallets) — Illinois

why_surfaced: High fit: home furnishings truckload; transparent ask and retail band; strong manifest narrative.

title: Wayfair box-damage truckload (26 pallets) — New Jersey
est_resale_or_benchmark: Same as IL comp; est retail $65k–$95k per listing

why_surfaced: Similar economics to IL load; NJ FOB may fit customer freight lanes.

title: Mixed furniture box-damage (24 pallets) — Florida

legitimacy_note: Clear SKU page; mixed furniture returns; lower entry price than Wayfair loads.
why_surfaced: Lower capital at risk; good category breadth (chairs beds desks couches).
